texto: This was the plan: we would take a holy and sacred picture of the King of Rock ‘n’ Roll, Elvis Presley, to the very summit of the earth; once there, we would place it with sincere reverence amongst the chimerical shimmering palaces of ice and snow and then (accompanied by some weird Zen magic) we would light joss sticks, dance about making screechy kung-fu noises, get off our faces, and that would be it: Planet Earth saved. Simple.
explicacao: Citação de Mark Manning sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This was the plan: we would take a holy and sacred picture of the King of Rock ‘n’ Roll, Elvis Pr…” articula reflexao, elvis-presley, healing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como healing e quest.
